summary: Completed testing of subscription plan system, tap game, and mining features. All 14 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI testing verified that Tap Game correctly shows plan-based tap limits (400 for Elite), PRC per tap (0.03 for Elite), and multiplier badges (3x BONUS). Mining page displays correct mining rate from backend (81.3/hour). Header padding fix verified - no overlap issues on Dashboard, Profile, or Mining pages.
critical_code_review_comments: TapGame.js correctly uses PLAN_CONFIG with tap limits: Explorer(100), Startup(200), Growth(300), Elite(400)
TapGame.js correctly displays PRC per tap based on plan: 0.01, 0.015, 0.02, 0.03
Mining.js correctly fetches mining_rate_per_hour from /api/mining/status endpoint
Mining API returns active_referrals and referral_breakdown fields as expected
Header padding fix (pt-20 with safe-area-inset) applied to Dashboard, Profile, and Mining pages
No VIP text in Tap Game - correctly using new plan names (Explorer, Startup, Growth, Elite)
seed_data_creation: Used existing test users with Elite subscription plan
context_for_next_testing_agent: Subscription plan system fully implemented with 4 tiers: Explorer (free, 100 taps, 0.01 PRC/tap, 1x), Startup (200 taps, 0.015 PRC/tap, 1.5x), Growth (300 taps, 0.02 PRC/tap, 2x), Elite (400 taps, 0.03 PRC/tap, 3x). Mining API returns active_referrals and referral_breakdown for referral bonus calculation. Header padding fix applied to prevent TopBar overlap.

Tap Game - Plan-based tap limits.details: Elite user sees 400 taps/day limit, Explorer would see 100

Tap Game - PRC per tap.details: Elite user sees 0.03 PRC per tap, correctly displayed in UI

Tap Game - Multiplier badge.details: 3x BONUS badge displayed for Elite plan

Mining - Rate from backend.details: Mining page shows 81.3/hour rate fetched from /api/mining/status

Mining API - referral_breakdown.details: API returns referral_breakdown field (dict with level data)

Header padding - Dashboard.details: Content not overlapped by TopBar, pt-20 padding applied

Header padding - Profile.details: Content not overlapped by TopBar, pt-20 padding applied

Header padding - Mining.details: Content not overlapped by TopBar, pt-20 padding applied

No VIP text in Tap Game.details: Tap Game uses new plan names (Explorer, Startup, Growth, Elite) instead of VIP

api_endpoints_tested.POST /api/game/tap/{uid}: PASS - Endpoint exists and accepts tap requests
